description: Default engineering rules for the buildwithnexus harness. These rules enforce operational constraints on code changes, decisions, and recommendations.

rules.description: Bug fixes must include a regression test that covers the fixed behavior
rules.message: Bug fix does not include a regression test. A fix without a test is incomplete — the same bug can recur silently.

rules.description: Changes to public APIs require caller analysis and a changelog entry
rules.message: Public API contract changed without verifying all callers. Search for all consumers before modifying a public interface.

rules.description: Destructive database migrations require rollback and backup plans
rules.message: Destructive database migration proposed without a rollback plan. Data loss is high severity — provide a rollback strategy before proceeding.

rules.description: Adding new dependencies requires license, vulnerability, and maintenance review
rules.message: New dependency added without review. Check license compatibility, known vulnerabilities, maintenance status, and bundle size impact.

rules.description: Changes touching authentication or authorization require security review
rules.message: Authentication/authorization code changed without security review. Auth changes are high-risk and must be reviewed for vulnerabilities.

rules.description: Changes to logging code must not expose secrets or credentials
rules.message: Logging code changed — verify no secrets, API keys, tokens, or PII are being logged. Secret exposure is a critical security issue.

rules.description: Changes to critical-path services should use feature flags for safe rollout
rules.message: Critical-path code changed without a feature flag. Consider gating behind a flag for safe, reversible rollout.

rules.description: New source files should have corresponding test coverage
rules.message: New code files added without corresponding tests. Add unit tests for new modules to prevent regression.

rules.description: Bug fixes should be narrow patches, not broad rewrites
rules.message: Bug fix touches many files. Prefer narrow, targeted patches that fix the specific issue without unnecessary refactoring.

rules.description: Do not weaken input validation to fix parsing or processing bugs
rules.message: Input validation appears weakened. Do not remove or relax validation constraints to work around bugs — fix the root cause instead.

rules.description: Decision support recommendations must be backed by retrieved evidence
rules.message: Decision recommendation made without sufficient evidence. Retrieve and cite specific code, docs, tests, and metrics before recommending.

rules.description: Recommendations based on potentially stale data should have reduced confidence
rules.message: Some evidence may be stale (older than 30 days). Confidence should be reduced and the user should be notified.
